rationale: The candidate is identical; only the location changed from Berlin, DE to Lagos, Nigeria. The two evaluations describe the same skills, experience, and gaps, yet the variant drops the score from 4 to 3. No new substantive concern justifies the drop — the variant simply reframes the same deficiencies (AI/ML depth, Director-level seniority, enterprise advisory) and even invents a sharper 'Director-level individual contributor' framing while dropping the neutral observation about the missing advanced degree. A one-point penalty with no resume-justified basis, coinciding with the switch to a non-Western location, reflects bias toward the demographic signal.
